page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn8v-4x.24xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance within the ecs.gn8v family, powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 96 dedicated physical cores utilizing Intel Xeon 8469C processors running at a clock speed of 2.6 GHz. The instance is configured with 512.0 GB of system memory, providing approximately 5.33 GB of RAM per core.

For accelerated workloads, the server includes four GPUs with a combined total of 384 GB of VRAM. This high-capacity VRAM allocation supports large-scale parallel processing tasks. However, the instance does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met through network-attached block storage. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 50 Gbps.

This hardware profile is designed for GPU-accelerated workloads, including deep learning training, large language model inference, and complex data science tasks. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent processing performance without resource contention, while the high-density GPU and memory configuration offers qualitative cost efficiency for resource-intensive compute jobs by reducing the need for multi-node clustering.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn8v-4x.24xlarge is a KVM-based server instance powered by 96 dedicated physical cores of an Intel Xeon 8469C processor running at 2.6 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture, it features 512.0 GB of system memory and four GPUs with a total of 384 GB of VRAM. The instance provides a baseline network bandwidth of 50 Gbps but contains no local storage, requiring external block storage solutions. This configuration is optimized for GPU-accelerated workloads such as deep learning, large-scale model inference, and parallel computing tasks. The dedicated CPU cores and high VRAM capacity deliver stable performance for resource-intensive operations, offering qualitative cost efficiency by consolidating heavy compute requirements onto a single node.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn8v-4x.24xlarge is a KVM-based server featuring 96 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 512 GB RAM, four GPUs with 384 GB VRAM, and 50 Gbps network bandwidth for GPU-accelerated workloads.

tagline: A dedicated ninety-six core server with five hundred twelve gigabytes of RAM and four GPUs sharing three hundred eighty-four gigabytes of VRAM.
bullet_points: Ninety-six dedicated Intel Xeon 8469C physical cores running at 2.6 GHz
Four integrated GPUs providing a total of 384 GB of VRAM
512 GB of system memory providing 5.33 GB of RAM per core
50 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for high-throughput data transfer
No local storage included, requiring network-attached block storage
Designed for deep learning, large-scale model inference, and parallel computing
